'''vazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tableful|tableful]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-zh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tableful|tableful]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vazhaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væzhækæth|væzhækæth]] || [[word:væzhækæj|væzhækæj]] || [[word:væzhækæsh|væzhækæsh]] || [[word:væzhækæ|væzhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vazhazhakath|vazhazhakath]] || [[word:vazhazhakaj|vazhazhakaj]] || [[word:vazhazhakash|vazhazhakash]] || [[word:vazhazhaka|vazhazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vazhakath|vazhakath]] || [[word:vazhakaj|vazhakaj]] || [[word:vazhakash|vazhakash]] || [[word:vazhaka|vazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vazhafkath|vazhafkath]] || [[word:vazhafkaj|vazhafkaj]] || [[word:vazhafkash|vazhafkash]] || [[word:vazhafkaf|vazhafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vazhakatha|vazhakatha]] || [[word:vazhakaja|vazhakaja]] || [[word:vazhakasha|vazhakasha]] || [[word:vazhakaka|vazhakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vazhakath|vazhakath]] || [[word:vazhakaj|vazhakaj]] || [[word:vazhakash|vazhakash]] || [[word:vazhaka|vazhaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vazhakathal|vazhakathal]] || [[word:vazhakajal|vazhakajal]] || [[word:vazhakashal|vazhakashal]] || [[word:vazhakakal|vazhakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vazhakathatha|vazhakathatha]] || [[word:vazhakajaja|vazhakajaja]] || [[word:vazhakashasha|vazhakashasha]] || [[word:vazhakaka|vazhakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vazhakathan|vazhakathan]] || [[word:vazhakajan|vazhakajan]] || [[word:vazhakashan|vazhakashan]] || [[word:vazhakakan|vazhakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vazhakathaoro|vazhakathaoro]] || [[word:vazhakajaoro|vazhakajaoro]] || [[word:vazhakashaoro|vazhakashaoro]] || [[word:vazhakakaoro|vazhakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
